Interface IGeometryFactory4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that create geometries from different inputs.

[Guid("6BA29D22-4802-4CE5-8FD6-C5081D90763D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGeometryFactory4 : IGeometryFactory3, IGeometryFactory2, IGeometryFactory
